author: Asokan, Deepak Ram; Huq, Fahian Anisul; Smith, Christopher M.; Stevenson, Mark
title: Socially responsible operations in the Industry 4.0 era: post-COVID-19 technology adoption and perspectives on future research
publication_title: International Journal of Operations & Production Management
abstract_note: Purpose – As focal firms in supply networks reflect on their experiences of the pandemic and begin to rethink their operations and supply chains, there is a significant opportunity to leverage digital technological advances to enhance socially responsible operations performance (SROP). This paper develops a novel framework for exploring the adoption of Industry 4.0 technologies for improving SROP. It highlights current best-practice examples and presents future research pathways.
short_title: Socially responsible operations in the Industry 4.0 era
